mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ScoreItemConfDAO.list 설 명 : 성적항목설정 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SCR_ITM_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.MRK_ITM_SEQ , A.MRK_TYCD , A.MRK_ITMNM , A.MRK_ITM_EXPLN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ORDER BY A.MRK_ITM_SEQ
